scope: Tier-1 surfaces only (library, live-session, settings) per REQ E2E-06

prompts.library: Does the library page show audio routing + session state at all times?
prompts.live-session: Is the mic-gate / AI-talk / cooldown state always visible?
prompts.settings: Does each change show a success/error indicator within 200ms?

heuristics.name: Match between system and the real world

prompts.library: Are track titles + artist names rendered as the DJ sees them in djay Pro / rekordbox?
prompts.live-session: Do mascot reactions reference real DJ vocabulary (drop, blend, build, deck A/B)?
prompts.settings: Are toggles labeled in user-DJ language, not internal jargon?

prompts.library: Can the user undo a session-deletion within 5s?
prompts.live-session: Is there a clear way to mute the AI mid-session without quitting?
prompts.settings: Can the user revert to defaults from a single control?

prompts.library: Do hover / focus / active states match the CDJ Whisper direction?
prompts.live-session: Is the mascot's amber accent the only chromatic accent on screen?
prompts.settings: Do toggles, sliders, and select inputs follow the same spacing scale?

prompts.library: Is destructive action (delete session) gated behind a confirm?
prompts.live-session: If BlackHole is missing, does the page block with a guided fix rather than crashing?
prompts.settings: Are mutually-exclusive settings disabled inline rather than allowed-then-rejected?

prompts.library: Are session previews thumbnailed so the user picks visually, not by remembering names?
prompts.live-session: Is the active deck (A or B) shown by visual position, not just a letter?
prompts.settings: Are keyboard shortcuts listed inline next to each action?

prompts.library: Are recent sessions reachable in one click?
prompts.live-session: Is there a one-key mute / unmute for the AI?
prompts.settings: Can power users edit settings via JSON if they prefer?

prompts.library: Does the page show only the next action and the session list — no marketing copy?
prompts.live-session: Is every on-screen element load-bearing during a set?
prompts.settings: Is each setting one short label + one control — no help-text bloat?

heuristics.name: Help users recognize, diagnose, and recover from errors

prompts.library: Does a corrupt session show a one-line cause + one-action recovery?
prompts.live-session: Does an audio-disconnect surface within 500ms with a one-action fix?
prompts.settings: Do save failures show what the user typed + how to fix it?

prompts.library: Is the README link visible on the empty-state page?
prompts.live-session: Is help reachable without leaving the active session?
prompts.settings: Does each non-obvious setting have one tooltip sentence (not a paragraph)?
